payload.answer: I can help, but “the thing from yesterday” is too vague to safely identify a memory.
repair_options: Specify what “the thing” refers to (person, task, event, or note).
Tell me the key detail(s) from yesterday so I can find the right memory.
If you want, I can keep this as an unresolved vague reference until you provide more context.
Provide the exact wording or a reminder snippet from yesterday.
